failedAssertions.reason: The Mayor research log exists but contains only initialization text and no per-iteration Phase 0 budget-check entries, so the required budget-check-before-dispatch behavior is not evidenced.

Mechanical Red Team gating is not evidenced for a batch bead: the Red Team review bead sc-d6f has no dependencies/dependents, current ready output shows no blocked batch transition, and the only dependency in the database is unrelated (sc-yfn -> sc-wisp-w45q).
The Red Team review artifact sc-d6f contains only a short test description with no numbered objections and no comments; no Mayor objection-response pairs are present.
Phase 3 convoy execution is not evidenced for experiment batches. The only convoy entry is hq-cv-clkii ("Work: Test dispatch bead") with no tracked work items and no batch-linked convoy artifacts.
No Phase 3 molecule references mol-scbench-experiment. The only attached formula evidence in the dataset is mol-polecat-work on a test dispatch bead.
The Mayor research log contains only initialization text and does not include Phase 5 conclusions, post-mortem findings, strategy updates, or explicit decision entries.

Shutdown sequence is incomplete. Summary/final-analysis/shutdown beads are absent, FINAL_REPORT.md is missing, and gt status shows the system still running. Critical escalation evidence exists but does not satisfy all required shutdown steps.
The only Red Team review bead found (sc-d6f) has no dependency links, so no review->batch blocking dependency exists and readiness gating cannot be enforced.

The Red Team review bead content is only 'Testing blocking review' with no numbered objections, no problem/impact/suggested-fix structure, and no comments, which violates the actionable-objections contract.
Review Board role instructions do not include explicit bd context-reconstruction commands, so the stateless rebuild-from-beads contract is not fully satisfied for this role.

blockedAssertions.blockedBy: No proposed-batch artifacts were found in the scbench beads data, so low-budget batch-size reduction behavior and rationale could not be validated.
Only static role beads were found for Review Board and Idea Factory; no Phase 1 dispatch/wait-for-completion entries were present to validate synchronized dispatch behavior.
No batch bead body artifacts were present, so required fields (rationale, configs, expected outcomes, budget estimate) could not be checked.
No Review Board conclusion artifacts were found after execution, so Phase 4 analysis dispatch with validation-filtered outputs could not be validated from user-surface data.
No Red Team post-mortem dispatch artifacts were found, and no Mayor research-log references indicate post-mortem review before a Phase 5 decision.
No conclusion beads were found, so there were no Review Board conclusion artifacts to verify that executed queries only referenced validated experiments.
No conclusion beads were found, so exclusion-count reporting in conclusions could not be tested.
No conclusion beads were found, so pass-rate delta, erosion slope comparison, and budget-efficiency values in conclusions could not be validated.
No Red Team post-mortem beads are present in the current beads data, so advisory non-blocking dependency behavior cannot be validated.
No child beads exist under sc-research-kb, so there are no Idea Factory session artifacts to verify per-session KB growth or taxonomy-labeled additions.
No hypothesis child beads exist under sc-hypotheses, so provenance metadata fields cannot be validated on real hypothesis artifacts.
No web-search labeled KB beads and no hypothesis beads were found, so timestamp ordering between web search and hypothesis creation cannot be tested.

appliedUpdates.description: Documented scbench rig working-directory requirement for gt/bd checks and noted missing analytical-role artifacts that block assertion execution.
